overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk waterfront city at night, featuring neon-lit modern architecture, palm trees, and suspension bridges. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, with the player character walking along wet pavements, descending stairs to a lower promenade, and passing pedestrians with umbrellas.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an upper waterfront promenade during a heavy rainstorm, with futuristic glass buildings and palm trees on the left and a foggy waterfront with a distant bridge on the right. Neon street lights cast a cool teal glow on the wet pavement marked with colorful crosswalk stripes.

illuminated platform structures floating on the water with orange accents

segments.scene_description: Descending wide concrete stairs to a lower waterfront promenade, leaving the upper street behind. Tall vertical light pillars illuminate the area while floating platforms with lights are visible on the water ahead.

entered.detail: massive cable-stayed bridge with tall towers and suspended roadway crossing the water
tall vertical digital billboards with glowing advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along the lower waterfront promenade beneath a massive suspension bridge that spans the dark water. Vertical light pillars line the left side while floating platforms and neon billboards are visible in the distance through the rain.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper waterfront walkway passing purple vending machines and amphitheater seating on the left. A tall neon-lit tower rises in the distance while pedestrians with umbrellas continue along the rain-soaked path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk waterfront, transitioning from an elevated promenade down to a lower harbor level and back toward a neon-lit urban plaza. It begins on an upper walkway where futuristic glass buildings and palm trees flank a wet pavement glowing with teal neon and colorful crosswalk stripes. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts downward via a set of wide concrete stairs, leaving the upper street behind to reveal vertical light pillars and floating platforms on the water. The path then extends along the lower promenade beneath the massive span of a suspension bridge, passing further light pillars and distant neon billboards through the heavy rain. Finally, the camera ascends back to an upper walkway, passing purple vending machines and amphitheater seating while moving toward a towering neon spire amidst pedestrians with umbrellas.
